#+TITLE: Technology Stack for [Project Name]

* Frontend
** Framework
- *Framework:* [e.g., Solid.js, React, Vue]
- *Routing:* [e.g., @solidjs/router, React Router, Vue Router]
- *Styling:* [e.g., CSS modules, Tailwind, styled-components]
- *Design System:* [e.g., Custom CSS variables, Material UI, Shadcn]
- *UI Components:* [e.g., Custom components, component library]
- *Icons:* [e.g., unplugin-icons, react-icons, heroicons]
- *Language:* [e.g., TypeScript, JavaScript]
- *Build Tool:* [e.g., Vite, Webpack, Turbopack]
- *CSS Processing:* [e.g., lightningcss, PostCSS, Sass]

** Development Tools
- *Package Manager:* [e.g., pnpm, npm, yarn, bun]
- *Linting:* [e.g., ESLint with custom config]
- *Formatting:* [e.g., Prettier, Biome]
- *Type Checking:* [e.g., TypeScript, JSDoc]
- *Git Hooks:* [e.g., Lefthook, Husky, lint-staged]
- *Testing:* [e.g., Vitest, Jest, Playwright]
- *Other Tools:* [List any additional development tools, plugins, or utilities]
